results.rendered_html:
anv-ā-√rabh to catch or seize or touch from behind;
to place one's self behind or at the side of, keep at the side of  AV.  &c.:
Caus. -rambhayati, to place behind another (with loc.),  TS.

results.rendered_html:
anvārabh 1 A.
1 To begin, commence.
2 To touch; aṃse'dhvaryumanvārabhate  Āśval. ; yadi māṃ saṃspṛśedrāmaḥ sakṛdanvārabheta vā . dhanaṃ vā yauvarājyaṃ vā jīveyamiti me matiḥ  Rām.
